# ALAssetsLibraryDataUnavailableError

**Global Variable**

The data was not available.

## Declaration

```swift
var ALAssetsLibraryDataUnavailableError: Int { get }
```

## Discussion

This error may be returned in the [doc://com.apple.assetslibrary/documentation/AssetsLibrary/ALAssetsLibraryAccessFailureBlock] for [doc://com.apple.assetslibrary/documentation/AssetsLibrary/ALAssetsLibrary/enumerateGroups(withTypes:using:failureBlock:)] and [doc://com.apple.assetslibrary/documentation/AssetsLibrary/ALAssetsLibrary/asset(for:resultBlock:failureBlock:)]; and in the completion blocks for [doc://com.apple.assetslibrary/documentation/AssetsLibrary/ALAssetsLibrary/writeImage(toSavedPhotosAlbum:orientation:completionBlock:)] and [doc://com.apple.assetslibrary/documentation/AssetsLibrary/ALAssetsLibrary/writeImage(toSavedPhotosAlbum:orientation:completionBlock:)]; as well as in the completion selector for [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/UIKit/UIImageWriteToSavedPhotosAlbum(_:_:_:_:)] and [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/UIKit/UISaveVideoAtPathToSavedPhotosAlbum(_:_:_:_:)].

## Constants

- **ALAssetsLibraryUnknownError**: The reason for the error is unknown.
- **ALAssetsLibraryWriteFailedError**: The attempt to write data failed.
- **ALAssetsLibraryWriteBusyError**: Writing was already busy when the attempt to write was made.
- **ALAssetsLibraryWriteInvalidDataError**: The data was invalid.
- **ALAssetsLibraryWriteIncompatibleDataError**: The data contained incompatible data.
- **ALAssetsLibraryWriteDataEncodingError**: The data contained data with the wrong encoding.
- **ALAssetsLibraryWriteDiskSpaceError**: There was not enough space on the disk to write the data.
- **ALAssetsLibraryAccessUserDeniedError**: The user denied access to the library.
- **ALAssetsLibraryAccessGloballyDeniedError**: Access to the library was denied globally.
